Short tile and Commencement :—(i) These regulations maybe 'calledthe National Highways Authority ofIndla (Recnritment, Seniority and Promotion) Amendment Regulations, 2012. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In regulation 12 ofthe National Highways AuthorityofIndia (Recnritment, Seniority and Pmmmion) Regulations, 1996 (hereinafier referred to as the principal regulations), alter clause (4), the following clause shall be inserted, namely :—- “(5) In case of selection of officers belonging to Central Engineering Services (Roads) of Ministry of Road Transport & Highways, the requirement to advertise the vacancies and screening of applications through the Screening Committee shall be dispensed with.” 3.
